TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, title = Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fernando_Chui_Sai_On} }

S.FORM: == Fernando Chui Sai-on == ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 1, Fernando Chui Sai-on, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Macau ta' misuw hya' ga Fernando Chui Sai-on, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Fernando Chui Sai-on == ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 1, Fernando Chui Sai-on, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Macau ta' misuw hya' ga Fernando Chui Sai-on, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *ernan*o ʦ~ʨħui s~ɕai-on == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ernan*o ʦ~ʨħui s~ɕai-on, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw maʦ~ʨau taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *ernan*o ʦ~ʨħui s~ɕai-on, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
